titleStmt.title: SII 29.346: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 346. (A.R. No. B. 118 of 1961-62.) GUḌILŌVA, BHIMILIPATNAM TALUK, VISAKHAPATNAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab near the waterfall close to the temple of Ranganātha about two miles from the village.

Records the raising of a garden containing several varieties of trees for the use of the god Ranganāyaka by Nārāyaṇa Gajapati, son of Nārāyaṇarāju and Buchchi Veṁkamāmba of Dhananjaya-gotra, for his own welfare and prosperity.
It is in late characters of the 17th-18th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī madaśēṣaprastuti pātra saurakṣatra putra dhanaṁ
jaya sagōtra maṁtra kṛtṣatrakula pavitra śrīnā
rāyaṇarāju putrēṇāruṁdhatīsamāna pātivra
tyādiguṇāvatyatēṁ matallikā śrī bucci veṁkamāṁ
bikā garbha śukti muktā maṇinā suguṇinā śrīnā
rāyaṇa gajapati rājasyēna kadābinmudāsa dā
va dāta saṁdhā mādhurī dhurīṇa dhārānavila dhārā
laṁ saṁtatāṁtaryāmi biṁtanātyaṁta durita saṁ
nyati saṁtāpa ciṁtāvāraṇa nipuṇa munigaṇa
ṇa śaraṇa sūcaka mahāguhā mukhasthala nistu
la tulasī bilyētaru nivōruṁbaka raṁbita ni
taṁba sthala viśālaṁ śrīlaṁbṛhadgi
rināmakaṁ kusuma tāmi talatādhā
maka madhiru vyāvalōkya citraṁ pavi
traṁ gōtraratna ciraṁtana midamitima
nyā sēnātra niraṁtara pravapāta nirādhā
ra sārā plavacita pāśā ṇya (?) khacita tā(ribha)
lāṁchanādhālayē rakta rakṣaṇa pārāya
ṇē nārāyaṇīkṣya raścābhīṣṭadāya
ka raṁganāyakaśca sakala tarumaveyābhi
rāma Ārāma ścētē pratiṣṭhitāḥ
Digital edition of SII 29.346 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
